CreateAHighlyAvailableVirtualIp.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateAHighlyAvailableVirtualIp.name: Name of the highly available virtual IP. Allowed characters: letters (upper/lower), digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_/. Must start with a letter or Chinese character. Length: 1–65
CreateAHighlyAvailableVirtualIp.subnetId: Subnet ID to which the highly available virtual IP belongs
CreateAHighlyAvailableVirtualIp.privateIpAddress: Specified IP address. Use "" for automatic IP assignment
CreateAHighlyAvailableVirtualIp.description: Description of the highly available virtual IP
